<!-- agent-py-sidecar: auto-generated; do not delete this line to allow refresh -->
# scripts/automation_job_runner.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-02T06:35:39Z

## Purpose
Voice/text automation runner for BMAD + Archon + OpenClaw + Ollama.

This runner treats "voice" as already-transcribed text. It does not record audio
or perform speech-to-text. It turns text into an execution plan with Ollama,
submits tasks through the OpenClaw-compatible API, and can install managed cron
entries for repeated execution.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import argparse
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import os
- from `_` import subprocess
- from `_` import sys
- from `_` import time
- from `_` import urllib.error
- from `_` import urllib.request
- from `pathlib` import Path

## Inputs
- CLI args: --api-url, --ollama-url, --model, --text, --file, --mode, --department, --mode, --department, --skip-plan
- Env vars: AGENT_MODEL, API_URL, OLLAMA_MODEL, OLLAMA_URL

## Process
### Functions
- `read_text(args)`: (no docstring)
- `http_json(method, url, payload, headers)`: (no docstring)
- `ollama_plan(text, model, ollama_url)`: (no docstring)
- `save_plan(text, plan, model)`: (no docstring)
- `openclaw_submit(text, api_url, mode, department, source)`: (no docstring)
- `add_interval_schedule(name, every, mode, department, prompt)`: (no docstring)
- `cron_command(name, text, mode, department, api_url)`: (no docstring)
- `install_cron(name, cron_expr, command)`: (no docstring)
- `cmd_plan(args)`: (no docstring)
- `cmd_execute(args)`: (no docstring)
- `cmd_run_once(args)`: (no docstring)
- `cmd_schedule_interval(args)`: (no docstring)
- `cmd_install_cron(args)`: (no docstring)
- `cmd_status(args)`: (no docstring)
- `parser()`: (no docstring)

- Writes files (detected 1 patterns)
- Return values from functions above
